title: Guillaume Chaslot
text: Home * People * Guillaume Chaslot Guillaume Chaslot [1] Guillaume Chaslot , a French computer scientist, and software engineer. Previously affiliated with Google , he now has founded his own company AlgoTransparency [2] and is engaged at Bayes impact , a group of practical idealists who believe that applied properly, data can be used to solve the world's biggest problems [3] . He holds a Ph.D. in 2010 from Maastricht University on Monte-Carlo Tree Search [4] , working in the fields of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning . Guillaume Chaslot is co-autor of the Backgammon program MCgammon , along with Jahn-Takeshi Saito author of the Go playing program Mango , and contributor of MoGo , both using Monte-Carlo Tree Search and patterns in the simulations and improvements in UCT [5] .
